name: SOT3 Three-Layer Vertical Slice Orchestrator
claimBoundary: ACCEPTED_REVIEW_EVIDENCE only. runThreeLayerScenario is a thin bounded orchestrator that invokes the real RefineryEngine, TruthKernel, and DistributionEngine instances in sequence using each layer's own public API, proving real cross-package composition through a fixed test scenario lifecycle. This entry does not claim the slice is a product policy owner, globally activated, always invoked by any CVF Web or production request path, a provider boundary, publicly exported, or production-ready. Activation into a real product path is governed separately by the SOT3 activation architecture decision and its A1-A5 proof ladder, not by this catalog record.
boundaryCaveat: Does not claim universal activation, provider/live behavior, public export, production readiness, or product-policy ownership. Local-ready scenario-composition existence only; wiring into any product request path remains governed by the separate SOT3 activation decision and roadmap.
